title: SONAR: A Progression Toward Machine Sight (with GESP 3B Integration)

# SONAR: A Progression Toward Machine Sight (with GESP 3B Integration)

Creator: Micah Hughes (independent researcher)
Date: 2024-08-24T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 15
Subjects: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Vision, Gradient Sensing, AI Grounding, Cognitive Architecture

A speculative research document outlining SONAR, a progression framework for enabling machine “sight” through gradient sensing, resolution improvement, optical instrumentation, and word-to-world mapping. Includes discussion of the GESP 3B probing method, examples of boundary interpretation, and implications for machine perception. Part of a broader lineage of independent research into Deliberate Humanity, AI alignment, and grounding methods. Prepared for archival purposes. Author Note: For non-commercial research, alignment, or safety evaluation purposes, derivative use may be granted upon request. Contact Micah Hughes (@8Tr3k) for licensing exceptions or discussion. This document is superseded by the full GESP 3B / SONAR package released Sept 7, 2025 under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. See: [link to full archive]
